system.descriptor: Linguistics represents fluency in a particular language or form of communication. Each specialisation grants the ability to speak, read, and write in that language.
system.uses:
Uses: Speaking, reading, and writing in a specific language. Basic communication requires no test, but complex or archaic texts, coded messages, or technical jargon may require a Linguistics test.
Special Use: Ciphers and Codes: A character with the appropriate Linguistics specialisation can attempt to encode or decode messages in that language.
Specialisations: High Gothic, Low Gothic, Chapter Runes, Eldar, Ork, Tau, Techna-Lingua, Underworld. Each specialisation must be taken separately as a distinct skill.
